title: malus dioica
intro: Malus dioica, also known as the Chinese crabapple, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China and parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Malus dioica include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of Malus dioica can be found in various forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat various ailments.
